testcase.name: Login Tests › should display welcome message after successful login
testcase.system-out:
[INFO] 3:18:20 PM - Navigating to login page [INFO] 3:18:22 PM - Attempting to login with mobile: 9011409986 [INFO] 3:18:22 PM - Filling Mobile field with value [INFO] 3:18:34 PM - Filling Password field with value [INFO] 3:18:34 PM - Clicking on Sign In button [INFO] 3:18:35 PM - Login initiated

testcase.failure:
[chromium] › Login\login.spec.ts:30:3 › Login Tests › should display welcome message after successful login
Error: expect(locator).toBeVisible() failed
Locator: locator('text=Welcome') Expected: visible Timeout: 5000ms Error: element(s) not found
Call log: - Expect "toBeVisible" with timeout 5000ms - waiting for locator('text=Welcome')
35 | 36 | const welcomeLocator = page.locator('text=Welcome'); > 37 | await expect(welcomeLocator).toBeVisible(); | ^ 38 | Logger.info('Welcome message displayed'); 39 | }); 40 | at C:\Users\groni\HRMS Automation\tests\specs\Login\login.spec.ts:37:34
